reviews.text: Great service ! We recommend them to all our clients.
Very prompt and knowledgable. Very Pleased with his presentation in helping to make our choice.

I recently had United Flooring America install hardwood floors in my home, and the results are stunning. The team was incredibly meticulous with the layout and ensuring the transitions between rooms were seamless. They clearly take pride in their craft.
Very happy with the work done by United Flooring America, they are very professional and on time. Highly recommended!

Extremely professional and the floors are absolutely beautiful. The floors have a superior finish (like aluminum oxide or urethane) that protect against scratches and pet damage are highly valued. I love it!!!
Affordable and good quality work. Very happy with the work done by United.
Amazing work. Very professional. Does the job on time.
Very happy with the results! The floors came out great and the crew was professional and respectful. I would recommend United Flooring America to anyone who's looking to get their floors done.

Excellent experience ! The team was professional, on time, and did a fantastic job on my salon floors. The quality of the work was outstanding and they left everything very clean. I would definitely hire them again. Highly recommend.
Amazing quality and is also very professional workers
reviews.subtitle: Local Guide
